LIFECYCLE [CX-LIFE-001]
- WP_ID: `WP-1-Loom-Storage-Portability-v1`
- STAGE: `STATUS_SYNC`
- NEXT: `STOP`

Merge/push is still blocked. I resolved the original Loom conflicts in-place in [wt-merge-main-loom-20260315-020307](/D:/Projects/LLM%20projects/Handshake/Handshake%20Worktrees/wt-merge-main-loom-20260315-020307) by taking the main-side baseline for [BUILD_ORDER.md](/D:/Projects/LLM%20projects/Handshake/Handshake%20Worktrees/wt-merge-main-loom-20260315-020307/.GOV/roles_shared/BUILD_ORDER.md), [TASK_BOARD.md](/D:/Projects/LLM%20projects/Handshake/Handshake%20Worktrees/wt-merge-main-loom-20260315-020307/.GOV/roles_shared/TASK_BOARD.md), and [WP_TRACEABILITY_REGISTRY.md](/D:/Projects/LLM%20projects/Handshake/Handshake%20Worktrees/wt-merge-main-loom-20260315-020307/.GOV/roles_shared/WP_TRACEABILITY_REGISTRY.md), then ran the required deterministic repair steps.

The follow-on blocker is `just gov-check`. It fails with:
`[PACKET_TRUTH_CHECK] Packet truth drift detected`
`.GOV/roles_shared/TASK_BOARD.md:137: active packet WP-1-Structured-Collaboration-Schema-Registry-v1 has status "In Progress" but Task Board token is [STUB]`

No merge commit was created and no push was attempted. `origin/main` therefore remains at `edfff1644d21a6f635cb65b654ba285831e04a3f`.
